title: EasyNotes
description: A powerful yet simple GUI-based note taking system that allows players to store and manage their personal notes on your server.
body:
# EasyNotes
A powerful yet simple GUI-based note taking system that allows players to store and manage their personal notes on your server.
**[ Installation | Features | Commands | Permissions | Support ]**
## Installation 1. Download the plugin 2. Drop `easynotes.java` into your plugins folder 3. Restart your server 4. Done! ## Features
**Add notes with ease through an intuitive GUI interface**
![notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105f2cc93d074f629141ac265e168dd90d24c30b.png)
**Easily print to chat and remove your notes with a simple click!**
![edit_remove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc3864729452054c7ecc594bc78914c685647f8a.png)
**Scalable GUI (Rows automatically adjust based on limits) - Examples**
Default rank with ( 9 notes limit = 1 row )
![default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e02151b417c6bd40cea77062e197fdc0b8a52100.png)
Member rank with ( 18 notes limit = 2 rows)
![member](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61785388d94bc8fa2b6d3a4edd432c171a96c65f.png)
**Sorting tool ( Newest / Oldest )**
![sorting](https://i.imgur.com/mFiWJQL.gif)
**Pagination system (unlimited pages)**
![pagination](https://i.imgur.com/pg1EkNM.gif)
**Admin View (access to all players' notes)**
![admin_view](https://i.imgur.com/01fjzqW.gif)
## Commands - "/note add " - To save a note - "/notes" - Access your notes via GUI - "/notes reload" - Reload plugin's config ## Permissions (Luckperms) - easynotes.use - Allows use of basic note commands - easynotes.admin - Access to view all players' notes - easynotes.reload - Permission to reload the plugin - easynotes.remove - Ability to remove notes (default: true) - easynotes.limit. - Note limit group permissions - easynotes.limit.unlimited - Unlimited notes permission ## Looking for support? Add me on discord: hawxy2k
